unknown.title: Unknown error
unknown.message: Something went wrong. Please try again.

network.title: Network error
network.message: Check your connection and try again.

timeout.title: Request timed out
timeout.message: The request took too long to complete.

forbidden.title: Forbidden
forbidden.message: You do not have permission to continue.

not_found.title: Not found
not_found.message: The requested item could not be found.

conflict.title: Conflict
conflict.message: The requested action conflicts with existing data.

payment_required.title: Payment required
payment_required.message: A payment is required to continue.

subscription.title: Subscription error
subscription.message: Your subscription does not allow this action.

redirection.title: Redirection
redirection.message: The request needs to be redirected.
